$description: Component tokens for Mobile Stepper Action component - a circular icon button used as the increment/decrement control within an Input Stepper. Supports 2 types (Decrease = minus icon, Increase = plus icon) and 2 states (Default, Disabled). Figma Reference: Node ID 576-15109

$component.name: Stepper Action
$component.description: A standalone circular icon button (48px) rendered as either a minus (Decrease) or plus (Increase) control. Used as a building block inside the Input Stepper component. The container background is always gray/100 regardless of state; the icon color changes to indicate enabled vs disabled status.
$component.structure: Circular container (48px × 48px, border-radius: 50%) with a centered icon (32px × 32px). No border. No shadow.

type.decrease: Minus icon — subtracts from the stepper value
type.increase: Plus icon — adds to the stepper value

usage.contexts: Always used inside an Input Stepper component. Not intended for standalone use.
usage.features: Single icon size (32px), circular container (48px), 2 type variants, 2 states

container.$comment: Circular container for the stepper action button

size.description: Mobile stepper action container size - 48px (width and height, square — rendered as circle via border-radius: full)

radius.description: Mobile stepper action container border radius - fully circular (50% / pill)

color.description: Mobile stepper action container background - gray/100 - #f2f4f7 (same for both Default and Disabled states)

icon.$comment: Icon rendered inside the circular container - minus (decrease) or plus (increase)

size.description: Mobile stepper action icon container size - 32px

default.description: Mobile stepper action icon color in default/enabled state - gray/600 - #475467

disabled.description: Mobile stepper action icon color in disabled state - gray/300 - #d0d5dd (muted to indicate inactivity)
